No Poverty.reason: No direct evidence in the syllabus regarding poverty eradication, social protection, or specific support for vulnerable populations.

Zero Hunger.reason: No evidence found in the course syllabus related to hunger, food security, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No evidence found in the course syllabus related to health, well-being, or disease prevention.

Quality Education.reason: The course is tertiary education, focusing on professional accounting knowledge and skills for employment, directly supporting Targets 4.3 and 4.4.
evidence: 奠定會計專業知識與能力 (Students will gain professional accounting knowledge in their field. )

Gender Equality.reason: While social responsibility is mentioned, there is no specific content or evidence related to gender equality in the syllabus.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No evidence found in the course syllabus related to clean water, sanitation, or water resource management.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No evidence found in the course syllabus related to energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course directly addresses career planning, digital transformation for employment, and business strategies, strongly supporting decent work and economic growth.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No evidence found in the course syllabus related to urban planning, sustainable communities, or heritage protection.

Life Below Water.reason: No evidence found in the course syllabus related to marine ecosystems, ocean health, or sustainable fisheries.

Life on Land.reason: No evidence found in the course syllabus related to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, or sustainable land management.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course directly addresses capital market fraud and auditing, which are crucial for reducing corruption and building transparent, accountable institutions (Targets 16.5, 16.6).
